caption: A large white airplane with red, blue, and white stripes along its fuselage and the word "POCC" in red lettering is positioned on a paved tarmac under a blue sky with scattered clouds. A person wearing a yellow safety vest and dark pants stands near the nose gear, while a white ground support vehicle is parked beside them. The plane's large engines are visible on the right side of the frame. In the top right corner of each scene, a red and white logo reads "13". As the sequence progresses, the camera pans slowly to the right, shifting the perspective of the airplane, the ground crew member, and the support vehicle. The plane remains stationary throughout the duration of the clip, and the person in the yellow vest maintains their position near the landing gear.
